name: Tabnine
what_it_does: Enterprise-grade AI code assistant focused on privacy and on-premises deployment. Tabnine provides IDE code completion and chat using either cloud or fully local models. Key differentiator: models can run entirely locally (no code leaves your network), models can be fine-tuned on your private codebase, and Tabnine offers the strongest enterprise compliance guarantees in the AI code assistant space. Built for regulated industries (healthcare, finance, defense) where code can't leave the environment.
use_cases: Deploy AI code completion for teams where code can never leave the company network — Tabnine's fully local mode sends zero data externally
Fine-tune Tabnine on your private codebase to generate code following your team's specific patterns and conventions
Provide AI code assistance in regulated environments (healthcare, finance) where GitHub Copilot's data handling isn't compliant
Centrally manage AI code assistance with organization-wide policies, usage analytics, and admin controls
Use Tabnine's chat feature for in-IDE code explanation, refactoring, and documentation generation with privacy guarantees
not_for: Individual developers without enterprise needs — GitHub Copilot or Codeium offer better free/individual tiers
Teams wanting the latest frontier models for code generation — Tabnine prioritizes privacy; Copilot and Cursor use more capable GPT-4 class models
Programmatic code generation API — Tabnine is IDE-integrated, not an accessible REST API
best_when: Enterprise teams in regulated industries who need AI code assistance with strict data privacy guarantees — especially when code can never leave the company network.
avoid_when: Individual developers or teams without strong compliance requirements — Codeium free tier or GitHub Copilot Individual offer more capable models.

auth.notes: SSO via SAML/OIDC for enterprise. Email login for individual/team plans. IDE extension authenticates via token from the Tabnine portal. No public API for external access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: basic code completion with limited model size and context
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro from $12/user/month; Enterprise custom (includes local models and fine-tuning)
pricing.notes: Free tier has significantly reduced capabilities vs Pro. Enterprise pricing requires sales engagement and includes on-premises deployment, fine-tuning, and compliance features.

performance.rate_limits: No rate limits for cloud models. Local models: CPU/GPU-limited.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: IDE extension surfaces errors as status notifications. No programmatic API for agent integration. Enterprise admin portal provides usage analytics and error logs.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Code completions are stateless per request. No server-side state for standard completions.
known_agent_gotchas: No public REST API — Tabnine cannot be integrated into agent code generation pipelines programmatically
Local model mode requires enterprise license and significant local compute — not plug-and-play for local deployment
Fine-tuning on private codebase requires sharing code with Tabnine's training pipeline — verify data handling for on-premises vs cloud fine-tuning
Annual enterprise contracts required for compliance features — monthly billing not available for enterprise tier
Model quality is lower than frontier model competitors — Tabnine prioritizes privacy over raw capability

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA compliant. Strongest enterprise compliance in AI code assistant space. Local model option = zero data egress. Fine-grained admin controls. SAML/SSO for enterprise. Code never stored or used for training without explicit consent.
